title: Corporate Financing Decisions: Common stockholders have the first claim on a company's assets...
summary: Evaluate Modigliani-Miller propositions on capital structure and firm value.
prompt: Common stockholders have the first claim on a company's assets in the event of liquidation.
solution: Common stockholders are last in line for claims on a company's assets during liquidation. Bondholders and preferred shareholders have priority over common stockholders in the event of liquidation.
